rules.advisor_language: Some records need human review before the result should be treated as meeting-ready.

rules.confidence_effect: medium confidence when proxy treatment is documented
rules.advisor_language: Proxy-based values are usable for demo discussion but should be labeled as approximations.

rules.confidence_effect: low or unknown confidence depending on recency
rules.advisor_language: Private or stale marks should be called out when they affect the report conclusion.
